Design Fixture

A compact local page with layered surfaces, responsive cards, motion hints, and replacement-friendly media roles.

Primary action Secondary action

Rhythm

Large first section, compact supporting grid.

Texture

Soft shadows and translucent layered backgrounds.

Motion

Small hover elevation with short ease timing.

Responsive shift

The layout collapses from a two-column hero and three-card grid into a single-column mobile reading path.

End state

Dark terminal-like closure to provide contrast evidence.
